message:
feat(node): enhance error reporting and observability in 4 modules

Improves diagnostic visibility by surfacing previously silent failures
and adding structured audit output.

- runtime/optimization_governor.rs: Replace filter_map() with map() that
  produces structured error entries when serialization fails, ensuring
  no silent data loss in optimization event streams
- ops/telemetry_bridge.rs: Capture and report persistence errors with
  guard-let binding, improving observability of audit log write failures
- main.rs: Add emit_migration_audit_report() function for structured
  migration audit output, supporting JSON/text/SARIF format selection
  for CI integration
- migration/mod.rs: Add test verifying migration audit report rendering
  produces correct structured output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -738,7 +738,16 @@ impl OptimizationGovernor {
     pub fn export_decision_log_jsonl(&self) -> String {
         self.decision_log
             .iter()
-            .filter_map(|entry| serde_json::to_string(entry).ok())
+            .map(|entry| match serde_json::to_string(entry) {
+                Ok(line) => line,
+                Err(err) => serde_json::json!({
+                    "event_code": "GOV_EXPORT_SERIALIZE_ERROR",
+                    "seq": entry.seq,
+                    "proposal_id": entry.proposal_id,
+                    "detail": err.to_string(),
+                })
+                .to_string(),
+            })
             .collect::<Vec<_>>()
             .join("\n")
     }
